checks.observed: Unauthed visit to / redirected to /he/auth/login with the email field and submit button visible.
Minted callback URL landed authenticated on /he; dashboard widgets (streak, points, daily task, topics) rendered with no redirect loop.
Streak=2, points=320, non-empty topic list with real counts (traffic-laws 2/501, vehicle 6/106, signs completed, safety not started) matching seeded topics; no NaN/undefined/empty values.
html has lang=he dir=rtl; visible labels match messages/he.json Home namespace (greetingEvening, streakLabel, pointsLabel); no raw keys or unexpected English on screen.
Suggested-topic CTA opened /he/topics/traffic-laws; #quiz-container rendered question 1/501 with 4 option buttons (question was text-only; no sign image applicable).
Selected answer highlights with aria-pressed=true and enables confirm; correct feedback (score +10) and wrong feedback (correct option revealed) both shown; question counter/progress advanced 1→2→3.
Each of the 3 confirmed answers produced POST /api/quiz returning 200; no 4xx/5xx requests in the flow.
Not observed: the topic quiz session spans all 501 topic questions, so #quiz-final and POST /api/progress were not reached.
checks.reason: Topic quiz has no batching (quiz-container data-total=501); completing 501 questions to reach #quiz-final is not feasible within the 25-minute timebox.

checks.observed: After 3 in-run answers the dashboard reflected them: points 320→340 (+10 per correct answer), traffic-laws count 2/501→3/501 (distinct questions), daily-task step 1 turned to a checkmark.
Zero error-level console entries across login redirect, dashboard, and the full quiz loop; only dev-mode warnings (Next.js LCP hint, unused CSS preloads) which do not occur in production builds.

Buttons and links expose accessible names (Hebrew labels); headings exist on every page (h1 on dashboard, h2 question on quiz); html lang/dir correct; answer selection exposed via aria-pressed and correct/wrong results carry visually-hidden 'תשובה נכונה'/'תשובה שגויה' text, not color alone; landing images have alt text.
Visible strings across login, dashboard, and quiz match messages/he.json (Home/Quiz/TabBar); no raw keys, English leakage, or mixed-direction breakage observed.

findings.title: Quiz restarts from question 1 in a new browser despite server-side progress and 'continue where you stopped' copy
repro_steps: Have a user with existing progress in a topic (dashboard shows 'חוקי התנועה 2/501 שאלות' and the daily-task card says 'אפשר להמשיך מאיפה שעצרת')
Open the app in a fresh browser/device (new session, empty localStorage) and log in
Tap the suggested-topic CTA to open /he/topics/traffic-laws
findings.expected: The quiz resumes from where the user stopped (after the 2 already-answered questions), consistent with the server-side 2/501 count and the 'continue where you stopped' promise.
findings.actual: The quiz opened at question 1 מתוך 501 and re-served already-answered questions. Quiz position is stored only in browser localStorage (within-browser reload does resume correctly — verified), so progress position does not follow the account across browsers/devices, while the answered-count does.
findings.notes: Filed as 'question' — client-local resume may be an intentional pilot simplification, but the dashboard copy promises cross-session continuation and the server already knows which questions were answered.

not_tested: Email sending / send-otp path — auth was minted (charter out_of_scope)
Flashcards / schedule / videos / resources / credits / more pages (charter out_of_scope)
Quiz completion: #quiz-final screen and POST /api/progress (CHK-QUIZ-04 blocked — 501-question session vs timebox)
Exploration probes not exercised: rapid double-click on confirm, browser back mid-quiz, empty-progress persona (test user has existing progress)
Sign-image questions in the quiz (the 3 questions served were text-only)
limitations: Only 3 of 501 traffic-laws questions were answered; the quiz loop was validated, not the full session.
F-001 cross-browser behavior was observed once (fresh Playwright profile vs seeded server progress); within-browser resume was verified working via reload.
The run mutated the QA test user's data (3 quiz responses, +20 points) — expected; qa/SETUP.md has a reset snippet.
Next charter suggestion: a short seeded topic or a batched quiz mode would make the completion path (CHK-QUIZ-04) testable.
